title: A Bacteriophage Capsid Protein Is an Inhibitor of a Conserved Transcription Terminator of Various Bacterial Pathogens
summary: The paper focuses on bacteriophage P4's capsid protein Psu and its inhibitory function against bacterial Rho proteins. No morphological or structural details (capsid shape, dimensions, tail type, plaque morphology) of bacteriophage P4 are provided in the text.
